behavior_in_task_description.reason: Tests assert exact strings like 'function appendRepeatEachIndexAnnotation', 'if (repeatEachIndex)', 'String(repeatEachIndex)', and 'repeatEachIndex: test.repeatEachIndex || undefined', but instruction.md never names the helper function 'appendRepeatEachIndexAnnotation' nor the specific '|| undefined' pattern.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the required behavior (annotation type, string conversion, non-zero condition) without dictating specific line changes or function names.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_append_function_in_view asserts 'function appendRepeatEachIndexAnnotation' exists and test_repeat_index_in_html_reporter asserts literal 'repeatEachIndex: test.repeatEachIndex || undefined' — alternative correct implementations (e.g., inline logic, different helper name, ternary) would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All f2p tests (test_repeat_index_in_types, test_repeat_index_in_html_reporter, test_append_function_in_view, test_annotation_calls_in_view, test_zero_index_not_shown) are string-grep assertions on file contents; no behavioral execution of the reporter.

test_not_tautological.reason: The tests require specific code constructs that implement the feature; a stub returning nothing wouldn't satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All instruction requirements (type field, reporter pass-through, annotation type 'repeatEachIndex', non-zero guard, both annotation lists) are covered by assertions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with clear section comments (pass_to_pass, fail_to_pass, static gates) and descriptive names.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output schema required beyond TypeScript type mentioned in instruction.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers match the repo structure.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction lists the three files to modify at the appropriate granularity without naming exact lines or helper functions.
